title: Aggregate a CSV With awk
description:
## Sum a Column

A CSV has been placed at **`/root/sales.csv`** with a header row:

```
region,amount
us,100
eu,200
us,150
eu,50
```

**Your task:** using **`awk`**, compute the **total of the `amount` column** (skip the header row) and write just the number to **`/root/total.txt`**.

> 💡 Set the field separator with `-F,`, skip the header with `NR>1`, accumulate into a variable, and print it in an `END` block.

hints.title: Field-based summation
hints.body: awk processes line by line; NR is the record number, $2 is the second comma-separated field, and END runs after the last line.

validation.description: Checks that /root/total.txt contains the column total (500).
